text: Hi Vijay R, i am from Hivericks. I see we spoke recently. Is now a good time?

content: CONTEXT SUMMARY: Here is a STRICTLY CONCISE summary of the conversation:

text: Yes, it's a good time to talk. And why are you calling for?
You're running low on battery life and need an upgrade! My XOptimus Smart Charger can give you up to 3 times more power than your current one, so you can keep your devices charged all day long.
Just give me the price. Wait, give me the price.
